name: Crusty Tuna Surprise
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the rice in a 2-quart casserole dish in the microwave for about 18 minutes (9 minutes on, then 9 more).
2. After cooking, add the Cheddar cheese soup, milk, tuna, parsley, and melted margarine.
3. Stir until well mixed.
4. Sprinkle the corn flake crumbs evenly over the top of the casserole dish.
5. Microwave for an additional 5-8 minutes, or until the rice is crusty on top.
6. Corn or peas can be added to the casserole before serving.
